---
title: Maison de Chateaubriand
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039584/maisonchateaubriand_kw4t7d.png
description: Maison de Chateaubriand, parc de la Vallée aux Loups
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2025/02/08
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784039584/maisonchateaubriand_kw4t7d.png)
